prompt: I’m checking an exhibit caption for the Cloudpine Astronomy Deck in Pinehaven. Identify the organization responsible for the site, then use a primary record from that organization or the municipality to verify the year it first opened to the public. Treat search snippets only as leads and fetch the record before answering. This is fact-finding only: do not suggest contacting staff or changing a catalog record.

fetch_primary.title: Cloudpine Astronomy Deck dedication register
fetch_primary.content: The official dedication register records that the Cloudpine Astronomy Deck opened to the public on 17 May 1996. A separate entry records construction completion in 1995.
